---
id: site-to-site-vpn
title: "Setup VPN site to site (GCP)  "
sidebar_position: 1
---
**Setup VPN site to site (GCP)**  

Login ke GCP :

* go to network connectivity
* choose VPN
* go to VPN setup wizard\
  ![A screenshot of a computer
  AI-generated content may be incorrect.](data:image/png;base64,)

\> Classic VPN for classic and basic routing

![A screenshot of a computer
AI-generated content may be incorrect.](data:image/png;base64,)

\> Setup the parameter you needed

![](data:image/png;base64,)

\
*youmust create an ip external before continue the proses on ip address

![](data:image/png;base64,)

* create new tunnel

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Remote peer ip address : you can get this from client “ip public gateway”

IKE pre-shared key : this key from client preshared key

![](data:image/png;base64,)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

bisa tonton di youtube ini https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Uhws3bXR7sc&t=2845s
